arts.ttl: Liverpool made me feel wanted – but it would have been a dream to play for Arsenal
arts.sum: Ryan Babel has admitted that while he was made to feel comfortable at Liverpool by Rafa Benitez, his teammates and the fans, a move to Arsenal was always a dream which never came to fruition

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool make the trip to St James’ Park this Wednesday as they visit Eddie Howe’s Newcastle United. The Reds are comfortably sitting at the summit of the Premier League table, with a nine-point cushion over second-place Arsenal. However, Arne Slot’s side face a tricky spell ahead of them with five of their next six games […] The post Newcastle vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could go and sign £50m striker instead of Alexander Isak this summer - journalist
arts.sum: Arsenal are in the market for a new striker. The Gunners have been looking for a new striker for some time, and they’ve been linked...

arts.ttl: Conor Bradley can be the world's best right-back - Liverpool could phase out Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Neil Lennon has been blown away by Conor Bradley's recent performances for Liverpool

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon eyes unprecedented Newcastle United triple swoop as vote opens
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon could pull off a similar double sweep this year, and if he does, he'll also join Bruno Guimaraes (2022) in holding both the club and national crown. Gordon’s end of season form for Newcastle earned him a place on the plane for England as they battled bravely to the Euro 2024 final.

arts.ttl: 'On top of the world' - Trent Alexander-Arnold makes Liverpool admission as contract doubts continue
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold remains out of contract at Liverpool at the end of the season

arts.ttl: Newcastle United in Brazil negotiations – Move welcomed by club’s board
arts.sum: Newcastle United are owned by Saudi Arabia’s Public Investment Fund [PIF] and they are in the process of buying another club. That’s according to Wednesday’s edition of Jornal do Comércio, and they state Newcastle owners are in negotiations to buy Santa Cruz Futebol Clube. arts.ttl: 'He immediately told me': 'World-class' player says he actually spoke to Arne Slot about joining Liverpool
Newcastle United vs Liverpool predicted line-ups with Isak decision made and Chiesa chance
arts.sum: Newcastle United predicted XI: Pope; Livramento, Schar, Burn, Hall; Longstaff, Guimaraes, Willock, Gordon, Joelinton, Isak. All eyes will be on the Newcastle United team sheet at 6.15pm tonight to see if Alexander Isak has been passed fit to start against Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah fighting three Liverpool teammates for unprecedented record as vote opens
arts.sum: After an eventful year that saw Jurgen Klopp depart and Arne Slot arrive, four of the Reds squad have been put forward for this year's Fans' Footballer of the Year award - and you can cast your vote now
